# CASE: plt-case-tooling-improvement-program

Five-thread productivity and delivery improvement program for the Woosoo ecosystem. Routes every
buildable item as a case through the standard agent chain; nothing bypasses Tier-3 governance.

## Handoff

This handoff note was relayed from the web Claude session (claude.ai) that researched and planned the five-thread improvement program. It captures the key implementation traps, in priority order.

**Route everything through the case system.** Each item below is a *case*, not an ad-hoc edit: `intake → triage → Contrarian → Specialist → Verifier → scribe → Executioner`, assigned to the right Bucket in `state/QUEUE.md`. Don't let tooling convenience pull Tier-3 work (auth, order state, printing, Reverb) out of the gated flow.

**Do-first (Tier 1, low risk):**
- `woosoo-nexus/.mcp.json` → add `cwd: woosoo-nexus/` + `--env=local`, or Boost won't boot (it self-disables at `APP_ENV=production`). **Already done — verified correct before this case was opened.**
- Stand up the **WSL staging mirror** (Sail or local MySQL, **sanitized — no real customer data**) before relying on Boost DB tools. Never point Boost at the live Pi prod DB. MCP runs client-side; Boost stays off the Pi.
- Global UI runtime error handler (`window.onerror` + `unhandledrejection` in `resources/js/app.ts`) → read via Boost `browser-logs`. **Done this session** — see [[cases/nex-case-032-packages-dining-tier-consolidation]] context; added to nexus `feat/runtime-error-handler` branch.

**Don't rebuild what exists:**
- Docs are **mature** (per-app BRDs, `API_MAP.md` + `openapi.json`, `END_TO_END_WORKFLOW.md`, operator/handover manuals). Thread C is **gap-fill only**: versioning/CHANGELOG policy, state-machine + sequence diagrams, troubleshooting trees, ecosystem BRD roll-up. Markdown stays canonical; GDocs/Sheet are one-way mirrors stamped "do not edit here."

**Highest-leverage net-new:**
- Frontend has **zero UI tests** on otherwise-strong infra. Build in order: error-handler → Vitest (high-risk components first) → Playwright + visual-regression at tablet viewport (the "UI accuracy checker") → a11y. Add CI jobs non-blocking first, then gating.

**Dashboard (Thread E) discipline:**
- Every % and ₱ traces to a named source (`WOOSOO_SPEC_DELTA.md`, `QUEUE.md`/`DONE.md`, deploy gates). Forward cost/effort numbers are **estimates — confirm before sharing**; delivered figures (₱375k billed / ₱875k fair value / ~₱500k absorbed) are authoritative from SPEC_DELTA.
- Starting fills: vs-spec ≈80%, prod-readiness ≈40–50%, tested = backend-high / UI-~0% (show as split bar).

**Don't forget:**
- **Datadog stays deferred** until the Pi stack actually ships telemetry — the MCP is dormant by design; don't wire it into hooks yet.
- Reconcile **Superpowers vs your Verifier** — one runs the proof command per task, raw output into `## Verification`; don't double-run the suite.
- Reconfirm the critical open items before go-live: broadcast-channel auth hardening, Print-Bridge ACK-backlog TTL, polling watermark loss (SPEC_DELTA §4).

## Tier

1

## Branch

docs/improvement-program-2026-06-14

## Problem

The Woosoo ecosystem now has five installed Cursor tools (Datadog, Obsidian, Laravel Boost, Context7, Superpowers) that are not yet wired into the 4-agent chain; the frontend has zero UI tests on an otherwise strong build infra; the documentation base is mature but has strategic gaps; and a stakeholder-facing delivery dashboard has never been published. These gaps mean tooling investment has not translated into QA, orchestration, or visibility benefits.

## Contrarian Review

Tier 1 classification. No app-code Tier-3 paths changed in this case. All five threads produce docs, config, or scaffolding — the heaviest technical item (runtime error handler) is two event listeners in `app.ts`. The risk of incorrectly classifying as Tier 1 is low: no auth, order state, printing, or Reverb paths are touched.

Pushback considered and resolved:
- *"The docs are already mature — is Thread C waste?"* → Confirmed gap-fill only; explicitly not rebuilding existing BRDs/API docs.
- *"Dashboard figures may be stale by the time anyone reads it."* → Addressed by the "How to update" section and clear source tracing on every figure.
- *"Adding Vitest and Playwright increases CI time."* → Accepted tradeoff; CI visual job is non-blocking initially.

## Success Criterion

Task is done when: (a) strategy doc exists at `docs/WOOSOO_IMPROVEMENT_STRATEGY_2026-06-14.md`, (b) delivery dashboard exists at `docs/business/WOOSOO_DELIVERY_DASHBOARD.md` with every figure sourced, (c) runtime error handler is committed in nexus on `feat/runtime-error-handler`, (d) WSL staging mirror case exists at `docs/cases/infra-case-011-wsl-staging-mirror.md`, and (e) all four items pass Verifier.

## Sub-case routing table

Each thread's buildable items are queued as their own cases:

| Thread | Item | Case slug | Bucket | Tier | Specialist |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| A | Session-start Boost `ApplicationInfo` hook | plt-case-boost-session-hook | B-follow | 1 | infra |
| A | `pre-edit-gate` / `post-edit-review` hooks for Context7 proof | plt-case-context7-pre-edit-gate | B-follow | 1 | infra |
| A | Run State → case frontmatter mirror (Obsidian Bases) | plt-case-obsidian-frontmatter-mirror | B-follow | 2 | scribe |
| A | Reconcile Superpowers vs Verifier in `USAGE_GUIDE.md` / `verify` hook | plt-case-superpowers-verifier-reconcile | B-follow | 1 | scribe |
| B | WSL staging mirror (Sail + sanitized schema) | infra-case-011-wsl-staging-mirror | B | 2 | infra |
| C | Versioning/CHANGELOG policy (ecosystem semver) | plt-case-versioning-changelog-policy | B-follow | 1 | scribe |
| C | State-machine + sequence diagrams | plt-case-docs-diagrams | B-follow | 2 | scribe |
| C | GDocs mirror — BRD roll-up + user manual + handover | plt-case-gdocs-mirror | B-follow | 2 | scribe |
| C | API versioning/deprecation strategy | plt-case-api-versioning-strategy | C | 2 | scribe |
| C | Troubleshooting decision trees | plt-case-troubleshooting-trees | C | 2 | scribe |
| D | Runtime error handler (`window.onerror`) | *done this session* | B | 1 | chuya-frontend |
| D | Vitest + @testing-library/vue (high-risk components) | nex-case-ui-vitest | C | 2 | chuya-frontend |
| D | Playwright + visual regression + CI job | nex-case-ui-playwright | C | 2 | chuya-frontend |
| D | a11y (`eslint-plugin-vuejs-accessibility` + `axe-playwright`) | nex-case-ui-a11y | C | 2 | chuya-frontend |
| D | Contract-linked UI check (intent-only payload assertion) | nex-case-ui-contract-check | C | 2 | chuya-frontend |
| E | Delivery dashboard (this session) | *this case* | B-follow | 1 | scribe |
